subject: [PATCH v5 02/21] swap: rearrange the swap header file

2026-03-20.patch_summary: This patch rearranges the swap header file (include/linux/swap.h) to group related functions into categories such as lifecycle swap, swap cache, and physical swap allocator/swap device APIs. The goal is a cleaner organization of the code without introducing any functional changes. Extern keywords are removed from the functions that were rearranged.
